case_title: NVI INVESTMENTS, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL PARTNERSHIP VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-05-2008 AT 10:00AM.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY NVI INVESTMENTS, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AAA CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-05-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NVI INVESTMENTS, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AAA CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $730.00, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-08-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
